prefs.language.title: Language
prefs.language.subtitle: Choose the interface language.
data.title: Data Management
data.db.title: Database
data.db.sourceDesc.default: Using the bundled MongoDB container. No custom connection has been configured.
data.db.sourceDesc.config: Connection string is saved in config.json. Use Migrate Database below to change it.
data.db.sourceDesc.env: Managed via infrastructure configuration (MONGO_URI environment variable).
data.db.restartWarning: The server will restart after saving to apply the new connection string.
data.db.envNote: The MONGO_URI environment variable is set — it overrides config.json. Edit the env var or unset it to manage the URI here.
data.migrate.title: Migrate Database
data.migrate.description: Move all data to a different MongoDB server. The instance enters maintenance mode, dumps all data, switches the connection, then restarts automatically.
data.migrate.envNote: The database connection is managed via infrastructure configuration (MONGO_URI environment variable). Migration is not available — update your deployment configuration to change the connection.
data.migrate.featureDisabled: Database migration is disabled on this instance. An administrator must set YTHRIL_DB_MIGRATION_ENABLED=true to enable it.
data.migrate.confirm: This will put the server into maintenance mode, dump all data, switch to the new database, and restart. Proceed?
data.migrate.success: Migration started — server will restart shortly.
data.backup.title: Backups
data.backup.description: Create a local backup of the current database. Backups are stored in the data directory and can be used to restore to a previous state.
data.schedule.title: Scheduled Backups
data.schedule.featureDisabled: Scheduled backups require YTHRIL_DB_MIGRATION_ENABLED=true on the server.
data.schedule.howOften: How often should Ythril back up your data automatically?
data.schedule.onWeekday: On which day of the week?
data.schedule.onMonthDay: On which day of the month?
data.schedule.monthDayHint: Choose a day between 1 and 28 (safe for all months).
data.dest.title: Backup Destination
data.dest.featureDisabled: Backup destination settings require YTHRIL_DB_MIGRATION_ENABLED=true on the server.
data.dest.description: Choose where your backups are saved.
data.dest.internalHint: Backups stay inside Ythril’s own data folder. Turn this off to also copy them to an external drive, network share, or any other location.
data.dest.pathHint: Must be a path the server process can write to. In Docker, a volume mount is required — see "Configuring the offsite path" in the User Guide.
data.browser.title: Browse for folder
data.maintenance.title: Maintenance Mode
data.maintenance.active: Active — all API traffic is blocked except admin endpoints.

login.subtitle: Sign in with your access token.
login.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
login.tokenHint: Paste your API token. Created during setup or via Settings → Tokens.
login.error.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Check your connection.
setup.subtitle: First-run setup
setup.done.message: Setup complete! Your admin token is shown below.
setup.done.warning: Copy it now — it won't be shown again.
setup.form.settingsPasswordHint: Minimum 8 characters. Used for future admin access.

brain.emptySpaces.body: Create a space in Settings → Spaces.
brain.reindex.stale: Embeddings are stale — the embedding model has changed and this space needs reindexing.
brain.query.search.label: Search your knowledge base
brain.query.search.placeholder: What do you want to find?
brain.query.topK.tooltip: Maximum number of results to return
brain.query.minScore.tooltip: Minimum similarity score (0–1). Higher = more relevant.
brain.memories.empty.noMatchQuery: No memories on this page match this search.
brain.memories.empty.title: No memories
brain.memories.empty.body: Memories will appear here once written by an MCP client.

brain.entities.empty.title: No entities
brain.edges.empty.noMatchQuery: No edges on this page match this search.
brain.edges.empty.title: No edges

brain.chrono.empty.title: No chrono entries
graph.truncated: ⚠ Result truncated — reduce depth or node limit to see full graph
graph.empty.title: Search for an entity to start exploring
graph.empty.subtitle: Tap nodes to inspect · double-tap to re-root
files.table.name: Name
files.viewMetadataTitle: View Brain metadata for this file
files.emptyFolder.title: Empty folder
files.emptyFolder.body: Upload files or create a folder.
files.preview.name: Name
auditLog.title: Logs
auditLog.server.empty.title: Server Log
auditLog.detail.title: Audit Entry Detail
mfa.title: Two-factor authentication (MFA)
mfa.subtitle: When enabled, admin mutations (create/revoke tokens, create/delete spaces) require a one-time code from an authenticator app.
mfa.enroll.instructions: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, etc.), then enter a code to confirm enrollment.
mfa.disable.warning: Disabling MFA removes the TOTP requirement for admin mutations. The secret will be permanently deleted from secrets.json.
mfa.success.enabled: MFA enabled. All admin mutations now require a TOTP code.
mfa.error.invalidCode: Invalid code — check your authenticator app and try again.
mfa.error.verifyFailed: Could not verify code. Try again.
conflicts.empty.title: No conflicts
conflicts.empty.body: All synced files are in agreement.
networks.title: Networks
networks.empty.title: No networks
networks.empty.body: Create a network or join an existing one to start syncing with peers.
networks.network.invite.title: Invite
networks.network.invite.pubsubDescriptio: Generate a reusable invite bundle. Share it in documentation, QR codes, or anywhere — subscribers can join without approval. Regenerating a new bundle revokes the previous one.
networks.network.invite.description: Generate a one-time invite bundle and share it with the brain you want to connect to. The invite expires after 24 hours.
networks.network.sync.title: Sync
networks.network.syncHistory.title: Sync History
networks.network.members.title: Members
networks.network.votes.title: Open votes
networks.dialog.create.title: Create network
networks.dialog.create.label: Network label
networks.dialog.create.spacesLoadFailed: ⚠️ Could not load spaces — enter IDs manually.
networks.dialog.join.title: Join an existing network
networks.dialog.join.bundlePlaceholder: Paste the invite bundle generated by the other brain here...
networks.dialog.join.collisions.title: ⚠ Space name collisions
networks.dialog.join.collisions.body: The remote network includes spaces that already exist locally. Choose to merge into the existing space or create a new local alias.
networks.wizard.title: Enable Networks
networks.wizard.step1.p1: This instance currently resolves to a local/private URL. Network peers cannot join or sync with local/private URLs because peer URL validation blocks SSRF targets.
networks.wizard.step1.p2: The recommended path is exposing this instance with a stable public HTTPS hostname via Cloudflare Tunnel.
networks.wizard.step1.whyItem: Why: dynamic home IPs and CGNAT are handled automatically.
networks.wizard.step1.riskItem: Risk model: the endpoint is internet-reachable, so keep strong tokens and monitor logs.
spaces.table.title: Spaces
spaces.table.column.label: Label
spaces.create.title: Create space
spaces.create.label: Display Name
spaces.create.purposePlaceholder: Describe what this space is for…
spaces.settings.label: Display Name
spaces.settings.purposeHint: — surfaced to MCP clients at the SSE handshake
spaces.settings.maxStorageHint: Leave blank or 0 for no limit
spaces.settings.strictLinkageHint: — enforce UUID refs; block entity deletion while linked
spaces.schema.autoSyncHint: Schemas auto-sync to schemas/ in the space files on save.
spaces.schema.entityTypeHint: — allowlist for entity.type; empty = any value accepted
spaces.schema.edgeLabelHint: — allowlist for edge.label; empty = any value accepted
spaces.schema.memoryTypeHint: — allowlist for memory.type; empty = any value accepted
spaces.schema.chronoTypeHint: — allowlist for chrono.type; empty = any value accepted
spaces.schema.globalTagSuggestionsHint: — hints for all knowledge types; any tag is still accepted
spaces.schema.tagSuggestionsHint: — hints for this type; any tag still accepted
spaces.schema.noProps: No property schemas yet — add one below.
spaces.schema.noEdgeLabels: No labels defined — all labels accepted.
spaces.schema.noTypes: No types defined — all types accepted.
spaces.dangerZone.renameDescription: Changes the internal identifier used by tokens, networks, files, and MCP clients. All references updated atomically.
spaces.dangerZone.wipeDescription: Permanently deletes all brain data and files. Space configuration and ID are preserved.
spaces.dangerZone.leaveNetworksDescripti: Leaves the sync ring for each selected network.
spaces.dangerZone.deleteDescription: Permanently destroys this space along with all brain data and stored files. Cannot be undone.
metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.error.load: Could not load storage data. Ensure the server is reachable.
metrics.alert.full: Storage is nearly full. Clean up files or increase the limit.
metrics.alert.warning: Storage is above the warning threshold.
tokens.created.title: ✓ Token created successfully
tokens.created.warning: ⚠️ Copy this token now — it will not be shown again after you dismiss this.
tokens.rotated.title: ↺ Token rotated — new secret
tokens.rotated.warning: ⚠️ The old secret is now invalid. Copy this one before dismissing.
tokens.create.title: Create token
tokens.create.label: Label
tokens.create.spacesLoadFailed: ⚠️ Could not load spaces — enter IDs manually.
tokens.create.spacesHint: Leave blank / deselect all to grant access to all spaces.
tokens.create.allSpacesTitle: Grant access to all spaces (deselect all)
tokens.list.title: Active tokens
tokens.table.label: Label
tokens.empty.title: No tokens yet
mfaPrompt.title: Two-factor authentication
mfaPrompt.body: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to continue.
spaces.schema.importTitle: Merge types from a JSON file
spaces.schema.exportTypeTitle: Export this type definition as a JSON snippet
spaces.schema.importTypeTitle: Import a JSON snippet into this type definition
spaces.schema.import.invalidTypeFile: Invalid type schema file — expected a TypeSchema object or { knowledgeType, typeName, schema } snippet.
spaces.schema.import.invalidFile: Invalid schema file — expected a typeSchemas object.
spaces.error.createTimeout: Space creation timed out — the server may still be processing your request. Please refresh to check if the space was created.
spaces.dangerZone.confirmRename: Rename space "{{ label }}" from "{{ id }}" to "{{ newId }}"? All references will be updated.
spaces.dangerZone.confirmWipe: Wipe ALL data from "{{ label }}"? This cannot be undone.
spaces.dangerZone.confirmDelete: Delete space "{{ label }}" ({{ id }}) permanently? All data will be destroyed.
spaces.dangerZone.confirmLeaveNetwork: Leave this network? This instance will stop syncing with its peers.
tokens.create.spacesFallbackPlaceholder: Comma-separated space IDs, e.g. general, project-x
tokens.confirm.rotate:
Rotate secret for "{{ name }}"?

The current token will stop working immediately. Copy the new secret before closing this dialog.
tokens.confirm.revoke: Revoke token "{{ name }}"? This cannot be undone.
networks.dialog.join.error.invalidJson: Invalid invite bundle — must be valid JSON.
networks.dialog.join.error.incompleteBun: Incomplete invite bundle — missing required fields.
networks.dialog.join.error.missingMyUrl: Enter this brain's publicly reachable URL.
networks.dialog.join.error.aliasRequired: Enter a local alias ID for space "{{ remoteId }}".
networks.dialog.join.error.aliasInvalid: Alias "{{ alias }}" is invalid — use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
networks.dialog.join.error.aliasExists: Alias "{{ alias }}" already exists as a local space — choose a different name.
networks.dialog.join.success.existingSpa: ⚠️ Existing spaces merged into sync: {{ spaces }} — data from the remote brain will be synced into these spaces.
networks.wizard.step1.resultItem: Result: use the public hostname as myUrl/instanceUrl in join flows.
networks.wizard.step2.hostnameHint: You must use a hostname inside a DNS zone you control in Cloudflare (for example ythril-desktop.example.com). Random domains you do not control will fail.
networks.wizard.step2.overwriteDns: Allow overwriting an existing DNS record for this hostname
networks.wizard.step2.overwriteDnsHint: Keep this off to avoid unexpected DNS changes. Turn it on only if you intentionally want this wizard to replace an existing record.
networks.wizard.step2.ackCritical: I understand this can install software, open Cloudflare login, create/update tunnel and DNS records, and start a background tunnel process/service on this machine.
networks.wizard.step3.autoReady: One-click mode is ready. Click Run automatically. Use manual commands only if automatic mode fails.
networks.wizard.step3.autoUnavailable: Automatic mode is unavailable. Use manual commands on this host, then click I finished setup.
networks.wizard.error.invalidHostname: Enter a valid public hostname (for example ythril-desktop.example.com).
networks.wizard.error.acknowledgeCritica: Please acknowledge critical system changes before running automatically.
networks.wizard.error.bootstrapFailed: Automatic bootstrap failed. Use manual commands as fallback.
networks.wizard.error.autoSetupFailed: Automatic setup failed. Use manual commands as fallback.
networks.wizard.status.autoSetupFinished: Automatic setup finished via local connector.
networks.wizard.status.connectorReady: Local connector is ready for one-click execution.
networks.wizard.status.connectorStartFai: Could not start the local connector ({{ detail }}). Manual commands are still available.
networks.wizard.status.statusEndpointUnr: Could not reach the local connector status endpoint. Manual commands are still available.
networks.wizard.confirm.verifyHealth: Did you verify that https://{{ host }}/health returns status ok from another machine/browser?
networks.confirm.leave: Leave network "{{ label }}"? You will stop syncing with its members.
networks.confirm.removeMember:
Remove "{{ label }}" from network "{{ networkLabel }}"?

This will stop syncing with that peer.
schemaLib.title: Schema Library
schemaLib.description: Reusable TypeSchema definitions for the whole instance. Spaces can reference an entry with $ref: "library:<name>" instead of duplicating the schema inline.
schemaLib.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, type or description…
schemaLib.empty.title: No library entries yet
schemaLib.empty.subtitle: Create a reusable TypeSchema definition that any space can reference.
schemaLib.refHint.prefix: To link a space to this entry, use
schemaLib.refHint.suffix: in its schema. Changes made here apply to all linked spaces immediately.
schemaLib.field.name: Name (identifier)
schemaLib.field.nameHint: Lowercase, numbers, dashes and underscores only
schemaLib.field.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description of what this schema is for
schemaLib.export.title: Download entry as JSON
schemaLib.import.noneImported: No valid library entries found in the file.
schemaLib.import.parseFailed: Could not parse the JSON file.
schemaLib.delete.title: Delete library entry
schemaLib.delete.usagesWarning: This entry is linked in {{count}} space type(s). They will be converted to inline schemas before deletion:
schemaLib.delete.unlinkNote: All linked types will be replaced with the inline schema from this library entry.
schemaLib.catalog.browseEmpty: No published entries in this catalog.
schemaLib.catalog.accessTokenPlaceholder: Paste the token from the remote instance
schemaLib.catalog.accessTokenHint: Required if the remote instance's /public endpoint is protected by an access token.
schemaLib.share.title: Share This Library
schemaLib.share.tokenDialogHint: The token grants read-only access to your /public endpoint. Give one token per consumer instance so you can revoke access individually.
schemaLib.share.tokenCreatedHint: Copy this token and store it on the remote instance. It will not be shown again.
schemaLib.badge.groupTitle: Click to filter by this group
schemaLib.field.schemaGroupHint: Tag this entry with a group name so related entries can be imported together.
schemaLib.exportSpace.title: Export a space's full schema into the library as a named group
schemaLib.exportSpace.dialogHint: All inline type schemas from the selected space will be added to the library and tagged with the specified group name.
schemaLib.exportSpace.namePrefixPlacehol: Same as group name if left blank
schemaLib.exportSpace.errorFailed: Could not export the space schema.
schemaLib.applyGroup.title: Apply all entries in a group to a space as $ref links
schemaLib.applyGroup.dialogHint: All library entries tagged with the selected group will be applied to the target space as $ref schema links.
schemaLib.applyGroup.errorFailed: Could not apply the group to the space.
spaces.schema.saveToLibraryTitle: Save this type schema to the instance library
spaces.schema.importFromLibraryTitle: Import from the instance schema library
spaces.schema.libPicker.title: Import from Schema Library
spaces.schema.libPicker.empty: No library entries for this knowledge type yet.
spaces.schema.libRef.linkedHint: Linked to library schema "{{name}}" — edit in Schema Library to change
